channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Vehicle left in same spot for about a month, 9th March
item.description:
Doesn’t appear to belong to anyone living nearby, hasn’t moved in all this time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Increasing potholes between railway bridge and tollington park, 9th March
item.description:
This section of road is becoming impassable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Hornsey Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside gates to the bolier house, 9th March
item.description:
Please remove.Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Webster Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southwark cleaning bags, 9th March
item.description:
Pile of Southwark cleaning bags at the corner of Sutherland Square and Sutherland Walk SE17. This is the second time I'm reporting... this has previously been marked at completed but had not happened

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refrigerator left outside 69 Ivydale Road, 9th March
item.description:
A white refrigerator has been left next to the bins in front of 69 Ivydale Road. Have confirmed with both flats that it did not come from any of the residents at this address. Has been outside for around 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivydale Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human Excrement, 9th March
item.description:
Human Excrement its unbelievable and a health hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Bermondsey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet dumped on pavement, 9th March
item.description:
Carpet dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Osborn Terr, 9th March
item.description:
After Greenwich cleaner came 2 weeks ago to clean the street, someone dumped a box full of garbage. Can you please pick this up on top of all bottles and fast food that cars leave there? We are seeing an increase of fly tipping and will hate to have to go back to an old situation of walking into a garbage area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osborn Terrace, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no.94, 9th March
item.description:
Please empty bin Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 154, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fridge freezer, 9th March
item.description:
Opposite 1B Durham Rise

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brondesbury villas: multiple tips 35, 78, 79, 85, 93, 100, - 97, 105, 109, 9th March
item.description:
Tables chairs constructions equipment bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Littering on Wenlock street, 9th March
item.description:
I reported this problem this morning and received an email saying it was resolved. It is not resolved but is worse than this morning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 9th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped an old sofa on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Totally wilted up road drain, 9th March
item.description:
This has been hear for months. Doesn't even appear on your map, it is On the opposite side of the road near number 94 Hayes lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist graffiti on a sign outside artesian health centre on grange Road and on lamp post opposite Boucher C of E school on grange road, 9th March
item.description:
Two instances of racist graffiti on Grange Road outside the health Centre at Bermondsey spa Park and on a lamp post 10 m away from it opposite Boucher Church of England School. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keyse Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned burnt out car, 9th March
item.description:
Abandoned car set on fire needs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tetherdown, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for litter clearance due to recycling debris along Leamington Avenue, 9th March
item.description:
There is a significant amount of recycling debris scattered along the length of Leamington Avenue. Items appear to have blown across the road and pavements, creating an untidy and unpleasant appearance for residents and visitors. A litter picker or street cleansing team would be greatly appreciated to restore the area to a clean and safe condition. Thank you for your assistance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leamington Avenue, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 abandoned Forest bike blocking entire pavement and intersection, 9th March
item.description:
5 irresponsibly abandoned Forest bikes blocking an entire pavement and intersection. Dangerous for all - including blind and otherwise disabled. Too mayo report individually. .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Great Guildford Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chest of drawers, 9th March
item.description:
Chest of drawers left. Everything not in bins has been tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left behind, 9th March
item.description:
Headboard left behind

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Croft Road, Enfield
